languages.text: "Мило. Но от меня не укрылся ваш оскал, Батошски. Предлагаю продолжить общение, когда разразится война, а до тех пор, так и быть, можете молча ненавидеть меня из другого конца залы".

"Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."
languages.original_text: "Мило. Но от меня не укрылся ваш оскал, Батошски. Предлагаю продолжить общение, когда разразится война, а до тех пор, так и быть, можете молча ненавидеть меня из другого конца залы".

traits.locale_text: "Charming. But I did not fail to notice your snarl, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our interaction when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the hall."
"Charming. But I did not fail to notice your snarl, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our interaction when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the hall."

"Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

"Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

languages.text: "Charmant. Allerdings ist mir Euer Murren nicht entgangen, Batoshski. Ich schlage vor, wir reden weiter, wenn Krieg ausbricht. Bis dahin könnt Ihr mich auf der anderen Seite der Brücke stillschweigend hassen."
languages.original_text: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

traits.locale_text: "Charmant. Allerdings ist mir Euer Murren nicht entgangen, Batoshski. Ich schlage vor, wir reden weiter, wenn Krieg ausbricht. Bis dahin könnt Ihr mich auf der anderen Seite der Brücke stillschweigend hassen."

languages.text: « Charmant... Mais je n'ai pas pu m'empêcher de vous entendre marmonner, Batoshski. Je vous suggère que nous reprenions cette conversation quand la guerre aura éclaté. En attendant, vous pourrez me haïr en silence de l'autre côté du pont. »
languages.original_text: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

traits.locale_text: « Charmant... Mais je n'ai pas pu m'empêcher de vous entendre marmonner, Batoshski. Je vous suggère que nous reprenions cette conversation quand la guerre aura éclaté. En attendant, vous pourrez me haïr en silence de l'autre côté du pont. »

languages.text: «Encantador. Pero no crea que sus refunfuños pasan desapercibidos, Batoshski. Sugiero que retomemos esta conversación cuando estalle una guerra. Hasta entonces, puede odiarme en silencio desde el otro extremo del puente».
languages.original_text: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

traits.locale_text: «Encantador. Pero no crea que sus refunfuños pasan desapercibidos, Batoshski. Sugiero que retomemos esta conversación cuando estalle una guerra. Hasta entonces, puede odiarme en silencio desde el otro extremo del puente».

languages.text: "Etkileyici. Ancak Batoshski, homurdanmanı fark etmemek mümkün değil. Savaş patlak verdiğinde sohbetimize devam etmemizi öneririm. O zamana kadar benden sessizce, köprünün diğer ucunda nefret edebilirsin."
languages.original_text: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

traits.locale_text: "Etkileyici. Ancak Batoshski, homurdanmanı fark etmemek mümkün değil. Savaş patlak verdiğinde sohbetimize devam etmemizi öneririm. O zamana kadar benden sessizce, köprünün diğer ucunda nefret edebilirsin."

languages.text: “真有意思。不过我可没漏掉你的抱怨，巴托什斯基。等战争爆发，我们再继续聊吧。在那之前，你可以在舰桥另一头默默憎恶我。”
languages.original_text: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

traits.locale_text: “真有意思。不过我可没漏掉你的抱怨，巴托什斯基。等战争爆发，我们再继续聊吧。在那之前，你可以在舰桥另一头默默憎恶我。”

languages.text: 「魅力的ですね。でも、あなたの不平を聞くことはできませんでした。バトシュスキー。戦争が始まったら、話を続けましょう。それまでは、橋の向こうで静かに私を憎んでもらいます。」
languages.original_text: "Charming. But I could not fail to notice your grumbling, Batoshski. I suggest we continue our conversation when war breaks out. Until then, you may hate me in silence from the other end of the bridge."

traits.locale_text: 「魅力的ですね。でも、あなたの不平を聞くことはできませんでした。バトシュスキー。戦争が始まったら、話を続けましょう。それまでは、橋の向こうで静かに私を憎んでもらいます。」
